name: mergen
title: Mergen — Local-First Runtime Debugging
shortDescription: Browser → 127.0.0.1 → MCP. Causal Context Packs for your AI assistant.
longDescription: Mergen is a local-first MCP server that captures console events, fetch/XHR traffic, and DOM snapshots from your active browser tab and exposes them as MCP tools. The bundled VS Code extension and Chrome/Edge extension stream events to a 127.0.0.1 server — nothing leaves your laptop. The killer tool is `analyze_runtime`, which returns a causally correlated Context Pack with ranked hypotheses and source-mapped evidence so your AI host can fix the bug instead of asking you to paste a stack trace.

tools.name: analyze_runtime
tools.summary: Causal Context Pack with ranked hypotheses.
